query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `properfySyncHistory` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `syncType` enum('cards','properties','leads') NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed','failed','partial') NOT NULL,
  `startedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `totalRecords` int DEFAULT 0,
  `processedRecords` int DEFAULT 0,
  `failedRecords` int DEFAULT 0,
  `errorMessage` text NULL,
  `lastPageProcessed` int DEFAULT 0,
  `nextPageToProcess` int DEFAULT 1,
  `totalPages` int DEFAULT 0,
  `durationSeconds` int NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `properfySyncErrors` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `syncHistoryId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `recordId` varchar(64) NULL,
  `errorMessage` text NOT NULL,
  `errorCode` varchar(50) NULL,
  `errorStack` text NULL,
  `retryCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `nextRetryAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `indicatorSnapshots` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `companyId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `month` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `indicatorName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `value` decimal(20,2) NOT NULL,
  `unit` varchar(50) NULL,
  `metadata` text NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_month_company` (`month`, `companyId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `indicatorSnapshots` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `companyId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `month` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `indicatorName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `value` decimal(20,2) NOT NULL,
  `unit` varchar(50) NULL,
  `metadata` text NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
